name: Multiple chemicals exposed over years, how to claim?

mainEntity.name: Multiple chemicals exposed over years, how to claim?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**File occupational disease claim with full work history, cumulative proof.**

Comp covers long-term exposures; doctor links totality[1][2].

- Job logs, safety data.
- Serial medicals.
- Expert on synergy.

Comprehensive docs essential; lawyer builds case. Valid path[1].
